data.title: SLB Development Ltd. Announces Proposed Privatization
data.description:
SLB Development Ltd. ( (SG:1J0) ) has provided an announcement.

SLB Development Ltd. is undergoing a proposed privatization through a scheme of arrangement, facilitated by Lian Beng Group Pte. Ltd. The acquisition involves purchasing all issued and paid-up ordinary shares of the company, excluding those held by the offeror. United Overseas Bank Limited is acting as the sole financial adviser for this scheme. The announcement also disclosed recent dealings in shares by Mr. Ang Yew Lai, a concert party with the offeror, who sold 500,000 shares, constituting 0.05% of the company’s issued share capital.

More about SLB Development Ltd.

YTD Price Performance: 69.23%

Average Trading Volume: 506,814

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: S$200.9M

data.title: PT International Appoints Independent Financial Adviser Amid Offer
data.description:
PT International Development Corporation Limited ( (HK:0372) ) has provided an update.

PT International Development Corporation Limited has appointed Grande Capital Limited as the Independent Financial Adviser to assist the Independent Board Committee regarding an offer from Marching Great Limited. This strategic move is part of the company’s compliance with the Takeovers Code, and stakeholders are advised to exercise caution as the offer’s conditions may affect its finalization.

More about PT International Development Corporation Limited

PT International Development Corporation Limited operates in the financial sector, focusing on securities dealing and corporate finance advisory services.

data.title: Creo Medical Group to Announce 2024 Financial Results
data.description:
An announcement from Creo Medical ( (GB:CREO) ) is now available.

Creo Medical Group announced it will release its audited financial results for the year ending December 31, 2024, on May 19, 2025. This announcement is significant as it could provide insights into the company’s financial health and its strategic positioning within the medical device industry, potentially impacting stakeholders’ perceptions and future investments.

More about Creo Medical

Creo Medical Group plc is a medical device company specializing in minimally invasive electrosurgical devices aimed at enhancing endoscopic procedures for pre-cancer and cancer patients. The company focuses on improving patient outcomes through its CROMA technology, powered by Kamaptive, which integrates multi-modal energy sources for precise surgical interventions.

data.title: BioCardia’s CardiALLO Trial Advances After Safety Review
data.description:
The latest update is out from BioCardia ( (BCDA) ).

On April 15, 2025, BioCardia announced that the independent Data Safety Monitoring Board recommended the continuation of the CardiALLO Allogeneic Cell Therapy for Heart Failure Phase 1/2 Clinical Trial, following a positive review of the 30-day safety data. The trial, which showed no major adverse cardiac events or immune reactions, is set to progress with the enrollment of 39 participants in the United States. This development is significant for BioCardia’s MSC platform, potentially aiding discussions around funding and partnerships, and could lead to future pivotal trials and approvals in the USA and Japan.

Spark’s Take on BCDA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BCDA is a Underperform.

BioCardia faces significant financial challenges, with ongoing losses and high volatility in revenue growth. While technical indicators suggest a potential rebound, the company’s valuation remains unattractive due to negative earnings. Positive trial results and financial improvements from the earnings call provide some optimism, but the failure to meet primary endpoints and unexpected market reactions highlight ongoing risks.

To see Spark’s full report on BCDA stock, click here.

More about BioCardia

BioCardia, Inc., headquartered in Sunnyvale, California, is a global leader in cellular and cell-derived therapeutics for the treatment of cardiovascular and pulmonary diseases. The company develops biotherapeutic platforms such as CardiAMP® autologous and CardiALLO™ allogeneic cell therapies, supported by its Helix™ biotherapeutic delivery and Morph® vascular navigation product platforms.

YTD Price Performance: -12.39%

Average Trading Volume: 66,767

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $9.27M

data.title: Truth Social Partners to Launch New Investment Accounts
data.description:
Truth Social ( (DJT) ) has provided an update.

On April 15, 2025, Trump Media & Technology Group Corp. announced a strategic partnership with Yorkville America Equities and Index Technologies Group to launch a new suite of Truth Social-branded Separately Managed Accounts (SMAs). These investment vehicles are designed to align with American values, offering strategies such as Faith & Values, Liberty & Security, Energy Independence, and Made in America. This initiative is part of TMTG’s broader financial services strategy, which includes plans for ETFs and a $250 million investment in collaboration with Crypto.com, aiming to enhance its market positioning by aligning capital with companies reflecting patriotic and ethical convictions.

More about Truth Social

Trump Media & Technology Group Corp. (TMTG) operates in the social media and technology industry, offering platforms such as Truth Social and Truth+, and is expanding into financial services with Truth.Fi. The company focuses on providing alternatives to Big Tech by promoting free speech and American values.

data.title: Yongmao Holdings Raises S$4.62 Million Through Digital Securities Issuance
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Yongmao Holdings Limited ( (SG:BKX) ).

Yongmao Holdings Limited has successfully closed its 3-month Series 003 digital securities commercial paper issuance on the SDAX platform, raising S$4.62 million. The issuance received strong demand from investors and included subscriptions from certain executive and independent directors of the company, highlighting confidence in the company’s financial instruments. The issuance is part of the company’s SDAX Multicurrency CP Programme, and further announcements will be made if there are material developments.

data.title: Avalon GloboCare Partners with SpecialtyHealth for Fitness Initiative
data.description:
Avalon GloboCare ( (ALBT) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 15, 2025, Avalon GloboCare Corp. announced a partnership with SpecialtyHealth, Inc. to enhance the BrAce 4 Impact Challenge, a fitness initiative for police chiefs, using the KetoAir breathalyzer. This collaboration, which began on April 1, 2024, aims to integrate ketogenic health management into law enforcement wellness programs, providing real-time ketone level tracking to support healthier lifestyle choices for participants. The initiative reflects Avalon’s commitment to innovative health solutions and strengthens its position in the precision diagnostics market.

More about Avalon GloboCare

Avalon GloboCare Corp. is a commercial-stage company focused on developing and delivering precision diagnostic consumer products and advancing intellectual property in cellular therapy. The company markets the KetoAir™ breathalyzer device, which is registered with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration as a Class I medical device, and is also involved in commercial real estate.
